name: harness
description: AI Harness Engineering System - A curated developer workflow with spec→build→QA pipeline, learning loop, and marketplace

interface.shortDescription: Spec→Build→QA pipeline + learning loop + plugin marketplace
interface.longDescription: A curated developer workflow system for AI-assisted development. Includes a multi-session spec→build→QA pipeline (planner/generator/evaluator + agents), a Hermes-style learning loop that captures session insights as reusable automation, and a plugin marketplace with one-command setup for Claude Code, Opencode, and Codex.
defaultPrompt: Run /harness:setup to adopt the harness in an existing codebase
Run /harness:planner to turn an idea into a complete project spec
Run /harness:generator to build features in parallel worktrees
Run /harness:learning-loop to capture what you learned this session
